raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehneſi/ tad tappe weena Ga-
weſchana iſfaukta preeſch ta
KUNGA pee wiſteem Laudim
Jeruſalemē/ ir pee wiſteem Lau-
dim/ kaſ no teem Pilſſahteem
Juha us Jeruſalemi nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad laſtija Bahruks tai
Grahmata tohs Wahrduſ Jeremijs ta KUNGA Namma/
eekſch ta Kambara Gemarijus ta
Dehla Sawana/ ta Rakſtitaja/
angſtâ Pagalma/ preeſch ta
KUNga Namma angſtu Wahr-
tu Durwim/ preeſch wiſfu Lau-
schu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Mikajus Gemar-
rijuſ Dehls/ ta Dehla Sawa-
na/ wiſfu Wahrduſ ta KUNga
no tahs Grahmatas bij dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogahje wiſsch ta
Fehnixa Namma/ eekſch ta Rak-
ſtitaja Kambara/ un redſi/ tur
fehdeja wiſti Leeli-Kungi/ Elisa-
mus taſ Rakſtitajs/ un Dela-
jus Semajus Dehls/ un Elna-
tanus Akbora Dehls/ un Gemar-
rijuſ Savana Dehls/ un Zede-
kijus Kananijus Dehls/ un wiſti
Leeli-Kungi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mikajus ſtabſtija teem
wiſſus tohs Wahrduſ/ ko wiſſch
bij dsirdejs Bahruku no tahs
Grahmatas laſſam preeſch to
Lanschu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija wiſſi tee Lee-
li-Kungi pee Bahruka Juhti
Netanijuſ Dehlu/ ta Dehla Se-
lamjuſ/ ta Dehla Kufus/ un faſ-
zija: To Grahmatu/ eekſch ka tu
eſſi laſſijs preeſch to Lanschu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Aufim/ jemut tawâ Rohed/
un nahz. Ta jehme Bahruks
Nerijus Dehls to Grahmatu fa-
wâ Rohkâ/ un nahze pee teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija uſwinnu:
Apſehdees/ un laſſi to preeſch
muhsahm Aufim. Un Bahruks
laſtija preeſch winnu Aufim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee wiſſus Mahr-
duſ dsirdeja/ iſbihjajahs weens
ar ohtru/ un tee fazztija uſ Bah-
ruku: Mehs ſtabſtiftim tam Feh-
ninam ſchohs Wahrduſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee waizaja Bahru-
ku/ un fazzija: Stabſti mums
jelle/ ka eſſi tu wiſſus ſchohs
Wahrduſ no winna Muttes
rakſtijſ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Bahruks fazztija uſ
teen : Wiſſch fanze wiſſus
ſchohs Wahrduſ no fawas Mut-
tes uſ manni/ un es rakſtiju
tohs ar Blakku Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztija tee Leeli-Kun-
gi uhs Bahruku: Eij/ un apſlep-
pees tu/ un Jeremijus/ un laid
neweens finna/ kur juhs eſſat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gahje tee pee ta Feh-
nixa Pagalma/ bet to Grahma-
tu notikke tee eekſch Elifamus ta
Rakſtitaja Kambara/ un ſtab-
stija preeſch ta Fehnixa Aufim
wiſſus ſchohs Wahrduſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tas Feh-
ninſch Juhti to Grahmatu dab-
buht/ un tas nehme to no Elifa-
mus ta Rakſtitaja Kambara/ un
Juhti laſtija preeſch ta Fehni-
na Aufim/ un preeſch wiſſo
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
